architecture_decisions.decision: Use Vitest with React Testing Library for unit testing
architecture_decisions.rationale: Vitest is native to Vite ecosystem, faster than Jest, provides same testing APIs. React Testing Library encourages testing user behavior rather than implementation details.

architecture_decisions.decision: Implement 70% code coverage threshold enforced in CI
architecture_decisions.rationale: Industry standard for critical business applications. Ensures core user flows are validated without maintaining 100% coverage which creates diminishing returns.

architecture_decisions.decision: Create test utilities and mocks for React Query and Router
architecture_decisions.rationale: Isolates component tests from external dependencies. Mocking QueryClient and Router prevents network calls and enables testing of loading/error/empty states.

architecture_decisions.decision: Use Testing Library's userEvent for user interactions
architecture_decisions.rationale: userEvent simulates real user behavior more accurately than fireEvent, testing the actual user experience.

architecture_decisions.decision: Implement market-driven feature: Print quota monitoring in tests
architecture_decisions.rationale: Competitors like PaperCut emphasize cost control and quotas. Testing ensures quota limits work correctly, preventing unexpected overage charges.

security_notes: Tests must verify password field has minlength attribute of 8 characters
Tests must verify sensitive data (passwords) is not logged or exposed in error messages
Tests should verify XSS protection by ensuring user input is properly escaped
Auth token tests should verify tokens are stored securely (localStorage patterns)
Document encryption tests should verify encrypted documents display encryption badge
Role-based access tests must verify admin-only routes are protected
market_driven_features: Print quota monitoring tests - ensures cost control features like PaperCut
Multi-page document handling tests - matches competitor document management
Device status monitoring tests - real-time status like Printix
Encryption indicator tests - security focus like YSoft SafeQ
Activity feed tests - audit trail like enterprise solutions
Filtering and search tests - usability features from market leaders
